TODAY IS THE DAY: GHANA NAMES ITS NEW BLACK STARS COACH. ⚽🇬🇭

The Sports Minister said Monday — and Monday is here. The GFA Executive Council has met, the shortlist is done, and the announcement is expected today.

What we know: Hervé Renard is reportedly out — his Saudi contract keeps him. The AFCON qualifiers are waiting for whoever walks in.

GreaterNews will bring you the name the moment it is official — follow us and turn on notifications.

(Source: Graphic Online | GBC | MyJoyOnline)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #BlackStars #GFA

Final predictions in the comments — who gets it? 👇

Today's the day: the GFA is expected to name the new Black Stars head coach — the ExCo has met and the Sports Minister promised Monday. Renard is reportedly out. We post the name the moment it's official. (Source: Graphic/GBC) #GreaterNews #BlackStars

GOOD NEWS FROM THE GHANA HEALTH SERVICE — AND A WARNING WITH IT.

No cholera outbreak has been recorded since the floods. Not one confirmed case, says GHS Director-General Dr Samuel Kaba Akoriyea.

But the risk is real: stagnant water, blocked drains and accumulated waste have raised the danger of waterborne disease. A mass fumigation and disinfection campaign is underway in markets, transport terminals and flood-hit communities.

The GHS's advice: drink safe water, wash hands often, and be careful what you eat and drink this rainy season.

(Source: GHS | Adomonline | 3News | Ghanaian Times)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #Health #AccraFloods

Share this with your family group. 🙏

GHS: no cholera outbreak recorded since the floods — but risk stays elevated from stagnant water and blocked drains. Mass fumigation of markets and terminals is underway. Follow official hygiene guidance. (Source: GHS/3News) #GreaterNews #Ghana #Health

NO MORE PATCHES: THE EASTERN CORRIDOR GETS A FULL ASPHALT REBUILD. 🛣

Roads Minister Kwame Governs Agbodza says the government is abandoning patch repairs on the Eastern Corridor Road — and rebuilding it completely in asphalt.

Why? Engineers say the corridor has exceeded its design life after more than a decade without major rehabilitation. Sections of the base itself will be removed and rebuilt before the new surface goes down.

For the communities from Tema through the Volta Basin to the north — this is the road that carries your goods, your travel, your trade.

(Source: Modern Ghana | Adomonline | Ministry of Roads)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #EasternCorridor #Infrastructure

Do you use the Eastern Corridor? Tell us what it's like today. 👇

The Eastern Corridor Road will be fully rebuilt in asphalt — not patched — Roads Minister Agbodza says. Engineers: the corridor has exceeded its design life after a decade without major rehab. (Source: Modern Ghana/Adom) #GreaterNews #Ghana
